sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n109232" key="u(posto/mia" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑποστόμια</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τά</gen>, <sense id="n109232.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">small tags of iron on the bit,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:1:184" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.184</biblScope> </bibl>; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐχῖνος</foreign> <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.</abbr> </sense> </entryFree>
